title: Tilt Shift City Map Vehicle Travel Diorama AI
sourceTitle: Tilt Shift City Map Vehicle Travel Diorama AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic tilt-shift miniature travel scene of Tokyo, featuring sleek white bullet train on a winding elevated road rising organically from a vintage illustrated city map. Subject: sleek white bullet train is the clear foreground hero subject, driving along the road as it curves toward the iconic skyline, landmarks, waterways, vegetation, and atmosphere of Tokyo. Scene: Tokyo Tower, Shibuya crossing, Sumida River, compact neon streets, and modern skyline merge with a printed vintage-style city map so the real cityscape and hand-drawn surface feel seamlessly integrated. Composition: 1:1 square aerial miniature diorama: road sweeps from the map foreground into the background skyline, the vehicle stays up front, and large bold typography TOKYO is printed directly on the map foreground. Signature Elements: Preserved tilt shift city map vehicle travel diorama source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Luxury travel poster crossed with miniature diorama, photorealistic tilt-shift detail, premium Instagram travel aesthetic, realistic textures, cinematic shadows, and clean uncluttered city storytelling. Color Palette: Warm golden-hour map paper tones, realistic city colors, vehicle paint accents, soft skyline haze, vintage illustration ink, and sunlit travel-poster highlights. Lighting: Warm golden-hour light, shallow depth of field, cinematic shadows, aerial perspective, soft skyline glow, and realistic material highlights on the vehicle and printed map. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic tilt-shift miniature travel scene of Paris, featuring classic red Citroen car on a winding elevated road rising organically from a vintage illustrated city map. Subject: classic red Citroen car is the clear foreground hero subject, driving along the road as it curves toward the iconic skyline, landmarks, waterways, vegetation, and atmosphere of Paris. Scene: Eiffel Tower, Seine River, Haussmann rooftops, tree-lined boulevards, and stone bridges merge with a printed vintage-style city map so the real cityscape and hand-drawn surface feel seamlessly integrated. Composition: 1:1 square aerial miniature diorama: road sweeps from the map foreground into the background skyline, the vehicle stays up front, and large bold typography PARIS is printed directly on the map foreground. Signature Elements: Preserved tilt shift city map vehicle travel diorama source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Luxury travel poster crossed with miniature diorama, photorealistic tilt-shift detail, premium Instagram travel aesthetic, realistic textures, cinematic shadows, and clean uncluttered city storytelling. Lighting: Warm golden-hour light, shallow depth of field, cinematic shadows, aerial perspective, soft skyline glow, and realistic material highlights on the vehicle and printed map. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Composition: 1:1 square aerial miniature diorama: road sweeps from the map foreground into the background skyline, the vehicle stays up front, and large bold typography TOKYO is printed directly on the map foreground. Signature Elements: Preserved tilt shift city map vehicle travel diorama source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Luxury travel poster crossed with miniature diorama, photorealistic tilt-shift detail, premium Instagram travel aesthetic, realistic textures, cinematic shadows, and clean uncluttered city storytelling. Color Palette: Warm golden-hour map paper tones, realistic city colors, vehicle paint accents, soft skyline haze, vintage illustration ink, and sunlit travel-poster highlights. Lighting: Warm golden-hour light, shallow depth of field, cinematic shadows, aerial perspective, soft skyline glow, and realistic material highlights on the vehicle and printed map. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
